## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential growth leadership role at GrowthX with candidate Sibi M.](https://fathom.video/share/Lvbe8Su_689B2qsoNQ6HA9GoNHtcsEio?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - GrowthX is an AI-powered growth agency ($8M ARR in \<1 year) with plans to develop products
  - [Role would involve client work, new service lines, and growing the company/community](https://fathom.video/share/Lvbe8Su_689B2qsoNQ6HA9GoNHtcsEio?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [Sibi has relevant experience and showed strong interest in GrowthX's approach](https://fathom.video/share/Lvbe8Su_689B2qsoNQ6HA9GoNHtcsEio?tab=summary&timestamp=716.0)
  - [Next steps are a small case study project and further team discussions](https://fathom.video/share/Lvbe8Su_689B2qsoNQ6HA9GoNHtcsEio?tab=summary&timestamp=2315.0)

## Topics

### Company Overview

  - GrowthX is an AI-powered growth agency (\~$8M ARR in \<1 year)
  - [Clients include Ramp, Webflow, Abnormal.ai, and startups](https://fathom.video/share/Lvbe8Su_689B2qsoNQ6HA9GoNHtcsEio?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [5-6 person leadership team covering key functions](https://fathom.video/share/Lvbe8Su_689B2qsoNQ6HA9GoNHtcsEio?tab=summary&timestamp=1888.0)
  - [Venture-funded with plans to develop products beyond agency services](https://fathom.video/share/Lvbe8Su_689B2qsoNQ6HA9GoNHtcsEio?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [Recently moved into new SF office, planning launch/fundraise announcement](https://fathom.video/share/Lvbe8Su_689B2qsoNQ6HA9GoNHtcsEio?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)

### Agency Services

  - [Take over pieces of clients' growth functions, delivering outcomes](https://fathom.video/share/Lvbe8Su_689B2qsoNQ6HA9GoNHtcsEio?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [Leverage AI workflows + experienced team to provide more quality throughput](https://fathom.video/share/Lvbe8Su_689B2qsoNQ6HA9GoNHtcsEio?tab=summary&timestamp=531.0)
  - [Current focus on SEO/content creation to build audience and convert](https://fathom.video/share/Lvbe8Su_689B2qsoNQ6HA9GoNHtcsEio?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)
  - [Exploring new services like social media ghostwriting](https://fathom.video/share/Lvbe8Su_689B2qsoNQ6HA9GoNHtcsEio?tab=summary&timestamp=1959.0)
  - [Aim to be "growth engine" for clients, not just content creation](https://fathom.video/share/Lvbe8Su_689B2qsoNQ6HA9GoNHtcsEio?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)

### Product Development

  - [Using agency as proving ground for potential product ideas](https://fathom.video/share/Lvbe8Su_689B2qsoNQ6HA9GoNHtcsEio?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)
  - [Building internal tools/workflows that could become products](https://fathom.video/share/Lvbe8Su_689B2qsoNQ6HA9GoNHtcsEio?tab=summary&timestamp=665.0)
  - [Exploring micro-tools as lead generation (e.g. AI-powered graphics generator)](https://fathom.video/share/Lvbe8Su_689B2qsoNQ6HA9GoNHtcsEio?tab=summary&timestamp=776.0)
  - [Community building around AI-led growth as potential product](https://fathom.video/share/Lvbe8Su_689B2qsoNQ6HA9GoNHtcsEio?tab=summary&timestamp=334.0)

### Role Overview

  - [Would be 2nd hire on growth team after Jason](https://fathom.video/share/Lvbe8Su_689B2qsoNQ6HA9GoNHtcsEio?tab=summary&timestamp=1988.0)
  - [Span client work, new service lines, company/community growth](https://fathom.video/share/Lvbe8Su_689B2qsoNQ6HA9GoNHtcsEio?tab=summary&timestamp=496.0)
  - [Opportunity to shape direction of fast-growing startup](https://fathom.video/share/Lvbe8Su_689B2qsoNQ6HA9GoNHtcsEio?tab=summary&timestamp=2286.0)
  - [Salary range $120-200k, equity details pending announcement](https://fathom.video/share/Lvbe8Su_689B2qsoNQ6HA9GoNHtcsEio?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)

### Challenges/Opportunities

  - [Improving efficiency of agency operations (3x potential)](https://fathom.video/share/Lvbe8Su_689B2qsoNQ6HA9GoNHtcsEio?tab=summary&timestamp=1946.0)
  - [Developing new AI-powered services (e.g. AI SEO)](https://fathom.video/share/Lvbe8Su_689B2qsoNQ6HA9GoNHtcsEio?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
  - [Bridging gap between engineering and marketing](https://fathom.video/share/Lvbe8Su_689B2qsoNQ6HA9GoNHtcsEio?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
  - [Building community and brand around AI-led growth](https://fathom.video/share/Lvbe8Su_689B2qsoNQ6HA9GoNHtcsEio?tab=summary&timestamp=238.0)
  - [Exploring product opportunities beyond agency model](https://fathom.video/share/Lvbe8Su_689B2qsoNQ6HA9GoNHtcsEio?tab=summary&timestamp=622.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sibi to complete small case study project](https://fathom.video/share/Lvbe8Su_689B2qsoNQ6HA9GoNHtcsEio?tab=summary&timestamp=2315.0)
  - [Further discussions with broader GrowthX team](https://fathom.video/share/Lvbe8Su_689B2qsoNQ6HA9GoNHtcsEio?tab=summary&timestamp=2315.0)
  - [GrowthX to share more details on investors/funding post-announcement](https://fathom.video/share/Lvbe8Su_689B2qsoNQ6HA9GoNHtcsEio?tab=summary&timestamp=1679.0)
  - [Sibi to discuss opportunity with current clients/commitments](https://fathom.video/share/Lvbe8Su_689B2qsoNQ6HA9GoNHtcsEio?tab=summary&timestamp=2660.0)
